title: Stewed Plum and Tomato Delight
description: A sweet and tangy stew made with fresh plums and tomatoes, perfect for a cold evening.

ingredients.name: plums
ingredients.notes: any variety, but firmer plums hold up better

instructions: 1. In a large pot or Dutch oven, heat 1 tablespoon of oil over medium heat.
2. Add the sliced plums and cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
3. Add the diced tomatoes, sweet potato, and beef broth. Stir well.
4. Add the apple cider vinegar and stir to combine.
5. Bring the stew to a simmer, then reduce the heat to low and let cook for 20-25 minutes.
6. Add water as needed to maintain a thick but not too dry consistency.
7. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
8. Serve hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
